TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Valjulu Itiniay i Jinfeng Cen no Taitung ko Valjulu a niyaro', 94 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 242 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 239 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko . Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Valjulu Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Valjulu a niyaro', 128 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 399 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 383 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan91%, Rukai3%, Bunun1%, roma1%. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i *infəŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u . ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Valjulu Itiniay i Jinfeng Cen no Taitung ko Valjulu a niyaro', 94 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 242 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 239 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko . Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Valjulu Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Valjulu a niyaro', 128 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 399 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 383 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan91%, Rukai3%, Bunun1%, roma1%. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
